name: Passover Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff.
2. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, beat the egg yolks and sugar until thick and light.
4. Stir in the matzo meal, potato starch, lemon juice, and grated rind of one lemon.
5. Fold in the beaten egg whites.
6. Pour half the batter into an ungreased 9-inch x 13-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 325°F for 25 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and spread with the apple mixture.
9. In a bowl, combine the grated apples, sugar, lemon juice, and cinnamon.
10. Spread the remaining batter over the apples.
11. Bake for an additional 20 to 25 minutes, or until brown.
